text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After her day off, Air Groove comes by my office.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What will that knowledge gain you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We have a mountain of other things to get to,
and there's precious little time to waste.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...But if you must know, I had a very typical day
off. There was nothing particularly special about
it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I took full advantage of it and am very satisfied.
That's all. Happy?
